docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER FILED BY MIRDAMADI, AMEEN
DECLARATION RE:REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT LATIFI, MASSOUD
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $75) SERVED OCT-16-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LATIFI, MASSOUD
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MIRDAMADI, AMEEN AS TO DEFENDANT LATIFI, MASSOUD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-27-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: RETURN MAIL RECD. SC-100 MAILED CERTIFIED TO MASSOUD LATIFI-NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-27-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-02-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF AMEEN MIRDAMADI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MASSOUD LATIFI IS NOT PRESENT. COURT DEEMED PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE IS INVALID. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER OF CONTINUANCE TO CURE PROOF OF SERVICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIRDAMADI, AMEEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LATIFI, MASSOUD $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,150.00, FOR PROPERTY DAMAGE IN THE AUTO/BIKE ACCIDENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIRDAMADI, AMEEN AS TO DEFENDANT LATIFI, MASSOUD

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-02-2022 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO JAN-06-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF AMEEN MIRDAMADI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MASSOUD LATIFI IS PRESENT VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE. DEFENDANT IS REQUIRED TO TIMLY SUBMIT A REQUEST FOR ZOOM APPEARANCE AT THE JAN-06-2023 TRIAL DATE. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE:REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM DEFENDANT GRANTED**
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-30-2023 - JUDGMENT.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
COPYING FEES (1 PAGE, 1 CERTIFIED COPY) PAID BY PLAINTIFF MIRDAMADI, AMEEN
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIRDAMADI, AMEEN AS TO DEFENDANT LATIFI, MASSOUD

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-30-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-30-2023 BY JUDGE MURLENE J. RANDLE. PLAINTIFF AMEEN MIRDAMADI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MASSOUD LATIFI IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MURLENE J. RANDLE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT LATIFI, MASSOUD
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-06-2023 - CONTINUED CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT CALENDAR TO JAN-30-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
